The design system for Alfred ai.

Foundations, brand assets, 113 UI components and product kits for Alfred — the decision intelligence platform for marketing leaders.

113components · 11 groups
89preview cards
light + darkapp & marketing themes

Alfred App

Alfred — CMO workspace

Login → briefing, Seek Alfred, KPI cockpit, spend, alerts, creative, AI visibility, integrations & settings

Alfred — onboarding

Connect your stack → calibrate → first brief (first-run flow)

Website

Alfred — marketing site

Dark decision-intelligence landing page (seekalfred.ai)

Components

Brand — Logo & Icon

Logo lockups and tintable brand glyphs

Core — buttons, forms, surfaces

Buttons, inputs, toggles, tabs, badges & avatars

Data — KPI, alerts & progress

KpiCard, DecisionAlert and ProgressBar

Marketing — signals, steps, stats, FAQ

SignalCard, StepFlow, StatBand, AgentStatus & FaqItem (dark)

Controls — select, segmented, radio, slider, chip

Form & input controls beyond the core set

Charts — spark, line, bar, donut, funnel

On-brand gradient data viz

Charts — advanced (area, stacked, gauge, waterfall, bullet, scatter, sankey, heatmap)

Plot frames with axes, gridlines & legends for decision intelligence

Trust — confidence, sources, recommendations, decision log, causal chain

The no-black-box primitives: traceable, confident, approvable

App — sidebar, page header, data table, filter bar, command palette

The product's connective tissue, as reusable components

Data & feedback — table, states, nav, banner, toast

Table, empty/loading, breadcrumb, pagination, stepper, banner, toast, menu

Conversation — Seek Alfred, messages & reasoning

The conversational surface: composer, suggestions, turns and agentic reasoning

Decision — scenarios, pacing, approvals & flags

Decision-intelligence primitives: simulate, pace, gate and flag

Inputs — textarea, search & file drop

The form primitives beyond Input: multi-line, search and uploads

Feed — activity timeline & notifications

Chronological activity and Alfred's notification inbox rows

Primitives — accordion, combobox, tags & steppers

Disclosure, autocomplete, multi-value and numeric input

Status — callout, spinner & progress ring

Inline insight, loading and circular progress

Marketing — pricing, offers & social proof

EyebrowBadge, PriceCard, OfferSwitch, Countdown, AvatarStack, integrations & module roadmap (dark)

Marketing — motion & product mock

DotMatrix, CapabilityTicker, AnimatedCounter, DashboardMock & JobListingRow (dark)

Trust — provenance, feedback & memory

ProvenancePanel, InsightFeedback, MemoryCard & ReasoningState

App — connections, billing & team

Connection health, sync, usage, billing, team, notifications, audit trail & empty state

Colors

Dark theme

Marketing surfaces — [data-theme=dark]

Brand gradient & glow

The periwinkle→orange signature and ambient page glow

Ink & Neutrals

Text, surfaces and hairlines

Primary — Orange

Core brand orange and its tints

Secondary — Periwinkle

The cool counterpoint to brand orange

Semantic states

Success · Warning · Danger · Info

Data-viz palette

--chart-1 … --chart-8 — categorical series order

Type

Accent — Bricolage Grotesque

Editorial accent for marketing surfaces

Text — Satoshi

The UI & body workhorse

Display — Clash Display

Headlines, covers and big moments

Type scale

Display → caption, in use

Spacing

Corner radius

From inputs to large surfaces

Elevation & shadow

Soft, diffuse, low-contrast

Spacing scale

4px base rhythm

Brand

Icon library

Custom CMO-intelligence glyph set — tintable

Logo lockups

Full lockup, mark & wordmark — color and white

Templates

Email — daily briefing

Transactional email: Alfred’s morning briefing

Social — OG card

Open-graph / share image

Collateral print theme

A4 one-pager classes — stats, battle grid, checklist, callout, CTA

Battle card — vs agencies & analysts

Your analyst forgets; Alfred compounds — the delegated-synthesis card

Battle card — vs BI tools

Decisions vs dashboards: the Looker / Tableau / Power BI category card

Battle card — vs generic AI

A chatbot answers; Alfred decides with sources — the ChatGPT / Copilot class card

Battle card — template

Reusable 1-page competitive battle card format for sales enablement

Collateral — case study template

2-page A4: situation → decision → outcome, sourced-metric slots + Northwind worked example

Collateral — demo leave-behind

2-page demo recap: Daily Brief → alert detail → approval, Northwind numbers, pilot next steps

Collateral — company one-pager

The flagship leave-behind: positioning, why teams switch, Northwind demo, sourced stats, CTA

Collateral — 30-day pilot plan

2-page A4: week-by-week plan, quantified success criteria, roles, exit criteria

Collateral — pricing one-pager

Tiers with INR + USD, quotas, launch offer, Enterprise band and fine print

Collateral — ROI calculator

Interactive dark screen tool: editable assumptions → hours saved, waste recovered, payback

Collateral — security pack

3-page A4: posture, data flow, access controls, subprocessors, FAQ

Alfred Deck

On-brand 16:9 presentation deck — cover, index, gradient section divider and content slides.

Alfred Sections

A catalog of reusable, on-brand marketing section templates — logo cloud, bento grid, feature split, comparison, pricing, testimonial, integrations & waitlist CTA. Lift any one into a page.

Pages

404

On-brand not-found page — one viewport tall

About

Mission, founding story, team, values and careers

Alfred Core

Memory-layer explainer — why it exists, what it does, the four pillars

Blog article

Editorial template — prose measure, pull-quote, cited stat, callout and author box

Blog index

Decisions, not dashboards — filterable post grid with newsletter capture

Contact

Talk-to-sales page — short hero, contact split, sales FAQ and closing band

Docs

Documentation shell — sidebar nav, four-stage model, getting started, TOC rail

Integrations

Thirteen integrations across six categories — directory with live/planned statuses

Legal

Document template for privacy, terms and cookie policies

Module in development

Honest waitlist page for Alfred for Sales — fixes the live 404 pattern

Pricing

Full pricing page — module & currency toggles, launch offer, three tiers, Enterprise band and pricing FAQ

Alfred for Marketing

Live module page — six agents on one memory, read less know more

Waitlist

Early-access capture — countdown hero, module roadmap, sourced stats + confirmation state

Decks

Decks — index

All marketing, sales & operations decks in one place

The AI memory powering every decision across your organisation

The end of the dashboard era

Sales — why Alfred (competitive)

Sales — product demo

A guided walkthrough of Alfred for Marketing

Sales — security & trust

Your data is yours, full stop

Sales — pricing & packaging

Pick the tier that matches your stack

From signup to first brief in under a week

A quarterly business review you can fill in

Operations — integrations runbook

Operations — customer success playbook

Driving adoption, retention and expansion
